message:
feat(bytecode): Add stack-based VM for eval/exec

Phase 4 of unified bytecode VM:
- Stack-based VM with full operand stack
- Binary operations: add, sub, mul, div, floor_div, mod, pow
- Comparison operations: lt, le, eq, ne, gt, ge
- Control flow: jumps, conditional jumps
- Collection building: tuple, list
- Subscript access for lists, tuples, strings
- Function call framework (placeholder)
- Reuses runtime.PyValue when available (not in tests)
- Conditional import for standalone testing
- All 4 tests pass

Design principles followed:
1. Reuse existing runtime types (PyValue)
2. Dead code elimination when eval/exec not called
3. Same bytecode format for all targets
